issues.summary: Preview how enhanced listing would appear
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to preview how my enhanced listing would look so that I can see the value before committing to an upgrade.

issues.summary: Queue listing actions to execute when back online
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to queue correction requests or updates while offline so that my actions are saved and executed when I reconnect.

issues.summary: Sort listings by various criteria
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to sort my listings by different criteria so that I can organize them in the way most useful for my current task.

issues.summary: Display personalized recommendations to improve listing health
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to see specific recommendations to improve my listing health score so that I know exactly what steps to take next.

issues.summary: Display all directory listings in organized grid view
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to see all my directory listings organized by status so that I can quickly understand where I'm listed and where I need to take action.

issues.summary: Update business information across multiple listings at once
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to update my business information across all listings at once so that I can make changes efficiently when my details change.

issues.summary: Search for specific directory listing
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to search for a specific directory so that I can quickly find and check my presence on that platform.

issues.summary: Display listings summary card on dashboard entry
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to see a summary of my listings status when I open the Listings Management feature so that I immediately understand my overall online presence health.

issues.summary: View available enhanced listing upgrades for each directory
issues.brief: User Story: As a business owner, I want to see what enhanced listing options are available so that I can understand how to improve my visibility on specific directories.
